---
title: "Public APIs and Datasets"
description: "World Bank, ACLED, NOAA, arXiv, Lichess — live data for game-theoretic analysis."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="public-apis-and-datasets"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Public APIs and Datasets</h1>
  <p class="lead">World Bank, ACLED, NOAA, arXiv, Lichess — live data for game-theoretic analysis.</p>
</div>
```
